---
title: "Musings over the “Christian Year” and “Lyra Innocentium” by Charlotte Mary Yonge together with a few gleanings of Recollections of the Rev. J. Keble, gathered by several friends. "
---

## Musings over the “Christian Year” and “Lyra Innocentium” by Charlotte Mary Yonge together with a few gleanings of Recollections of the Rev. J. Keble, gathered by several friends. 

**By Charlotte Mary Yonge**

**Published:** 1871
**Genre:** Non-fiction, criticism, biography
**Format:** Book

**Publisher:** Oxford and London: James Parker and Co.

### Notes

The other contributors were the Rev. T. Simpson Evans, Frances Maria Wilbraham and M.T..

---

[← Back to all letters](../../letters.html)
